description: Generate a ChIP-seq quality-control workflow bash script: sample correlation (multiBamSummary + plotCorrelation), PCA (plotPCA), coverage (plotCoverage), fragment size (bamPEFragmentSize), and ChIP enrichment (plotFingerprint).
rules: read-only — emits a bash script template; never runs deepTools or touches sequencing data
INPUT_BAM is the control/input BAM; CHIP_BAMS is a space-separated list of ChIP BAMs
all vars optional — unset ones use the generator's safe defaults
filenames are sanitized (no shell metacharacters, no '..' segments) before interpolation
usage: Optionally set INPUT_BAM, CHIP_BAMS (space-separated), GENOME_SIZE, THREADS. Output: chipseq_qc.sh (a customizable bash workflow to review and run separately).
limitation: Produces a template script only. Running it requires deepTools 3.5.6 installed (bamCoverage, plotFingerprint, etc.). Paths must satisfy the sanitizer pattern [A-Za-z0-9._/-].
